result.summary: Backstage exposes a public MCP endpoint at `https://mcp.backstage.com/mcp` and publishes an undocumented HTTP API described by an OpenAPI-style document at `https://backstage.com/openapi.json`; authentication for the HTTP API could not be determined from public docs.
result.description: Backstage is an online marketplace for performers, creators, and production teams to find auditions, jobs, and talent. It also provides tools for casting and talent discovery on its platform.
